header: {"User-Agent":"Mozilla/5.0 (iPhone; CPU iPhone OS 16_0 like Mac OS X) AppleWebKit/605.1.15 Mobile/15E148","sec-ch-ua-platform":"\"Android\"","origin":"https://m.00shu.la","x-requested-with":"cn.mujiankeji.mbrowser","Referer":"https://m.00shu.la/","Accept-language":"zh-CN,zh;q=0.9,en-US;q=0.8,en;q=0.7"}

ruleSearch.name: a[0]@text
ruleSearch.author: a[1]@text
ruleSearch.coverUrl: {{ var href = java.getString(result, 'a[0]@href') || ''; var m = href.match(/\/(\d+)\/?$/); if (m) { var bid = parseInt(m[1], 10); var aid = parseInt(bid / 1000, 10); return '/image/' + aid + '/' + bid + '/' + bid + 's.jpg'; } return ''; }}

ruleToc.nextTocUrl: @js: var options = JSON.parse(java.getElements(result, 'option') || '[]'); for (var i = 0; i < options.length; i++) { var val = java.getString(options[i], 'value') || ''; if (!val) continue; if (/_[0-9]+\/?$/.test(val) && !(baseUrl && baseUrl.endsWith(val))) return val; } var links = JSON.parse(java.getElements(result, 'a') || '[]'); for (var j = 0; j < links.length; j++) { var text = java.getString(links[j], 'text') || ''; if (text.indexOf('下一页') >= 0) return java.getString(links[j], 'href'); } return '';

ruleContent.nextContentUrl: @js: var links = JSON.parse(java.getElements(result, 'a') || '[]'); for (var i = 0; i < links.length; i++) { var text = java.getString(links[i], 'text') || ''; if (text.indexOf('下一页') >= 0) return java.getString(links[i], 'href'); } return '';
ruleContent.replaceRegex:
.*最新网址.*##
.*第\d+\/\d+.*##
上一章|下一章|返回目录|加入书签|下一页|上一页##
.*本章未完.*##
